offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate client billing reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient billing reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Indie Hackers discussions on billing tools
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice details and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export of summary reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
